name: Testimonial quote
when_to_use: 需要把一到数条用户评价作为交付物中的社会证明或重点引语时用它：适合案例摘要、产品介绍、研究报告和发布说明。若只是引用文献中的一句话，普通 blockquote 更合适；若要浏览大量评价、筛选评分或提交新评价，则应使用记录列表或专用评论界面。
why_valuable: 推荐语的可信感来自引语、署名、角色、头像和评分的稳定组合；本模板用无外部图片的 monogram avatar、可选星级和推荐卡强调，避免远程资源、头像破图或长短引语造成布局失衡。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need one or several customer testimonials as social proof or highlighted quotations in a deliverable, such as a case-study summary, product introduction, research report, or release note. For a single quotation from a source, a regular blockquote is better; to browse many reviews, filter ratings, or submit a new review, use a record list or dedicated review interface.
en.why_valuable: A testimonial feels credible when quotation, attribution, role, avatar, and rating form a stable combination; this template uses monogram avatars without external images, optional stars, and a highlighted testimonial card, avoiding remote resources, broken avatars, and layout imbalance from quotations of different lengths.

data_in.note: Each object in data.testimonials is a read-only quotation card. quote should be plain text, and author.name is required; author.avatar is a 1-3 character monogram or emoji, not an image URL, so the template makes no network requests. When omitted, initials are derived from name. stars accepts a number from 0-5 and rounds it to whole stars; highlight:true can emphasize one key testimonial. Show 1-3 at a time, and do not put unauthorized testimonials from real people into examples or production data.

schema.title?: string -- quotation-group title; displays "What people say" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- source scope or context; displays a quotation-count summary when omitted

_testimonialFields.quote: string -- quotation text; the template adds visual quotation marks automatically
_testimonialFields.author: {name:string,role?:string,avatar?:string} -- attribution information
_testimonialFields.stars?: number -- score from 0-5, clamped and rounded to a whole star; no rating is displayed when omitted
_testimonialFields.highlight?: boolean -- whether to emphasize it with a colored top edge and tinted background

_authorFields.name: string -- author name or public display name
_authorFields.avatar?: string -- 1-3 initials or an emoji; not a URL, and derived from name when omitted

spec.note: Grows naturally with quotation length; cards use an adaptive grid and keep attribution at the bottom, collapsing to one column on narrow screens. No remote avatars, internal scrolling, or carrier-size measurement.

data_in.note: data.testimonials 中每个对象是一张只读引语卡。quote 应为纯文本，author.name 必填；author.avatar 是 1–3 个字符的 monogram 或 emoji，不是图片 URL，因此模板不产生网络请求，省略时从 name 自动提取首字母。stars 接受 0–5 数字并四舍五入到整星；highlight:true 可强调一张关键评价。建议一次展示 1–3 条，并避免把未经授权的真实人物评价写入示例或生产数据。

schema.title?: string —— 引语组标题；省略时显示 “What people say”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 来源范围或上下文；省略时显示引语数量摘要

_testimonialFields.quote: string —— 引语正文；模板自动添加视觉引号
_testimonialFields.author: {name:string,role?:string,avatar?:string} —— 署名信息
_testimonialFields.stars?: number —— 0–5 分，夹取后四舍五入为整星；省略时不显示评分
_testimonialFields.highlight?: boolean —— 是否以强调色顶边和浅色背景突出

_authorFields.name: string —— 作者姓名或公开显示名
_authorFields.role?: string —— 职位、组织或关系说明
_authorFields.avatar?: string —— 1–3 个字符的首字母或 emoji；不是 URL，省略时从 name 推导

spec.note: 按引语长度自然增高；卡片使用自适应网格并保持署名区域靠底，窄屏自动单列。无远程头像、内部滚动或载体尺寸测量。

example._why: 三条明确为示例的虚构产品评价覆盖长短引语、自动与显式 monogram、可选星级和单卡 highlight，能完整检验卡片等高与署名区对齐。

minimal.title: Clarity teams can feel
minimal.subtitle: Illustrative feedback from a fictional product launch.

testimonials.quote: The weekly review went from a meeting everyone avoided to the clearest thirty minutes on our calendar.
I can see the decision, the evidence behind it, and who owns the next move without chasing three different documents.
It gives our research enough structure to be reusable without flattening the nuance.

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；引语、署名、monogram 和星级均为只读展示。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root，头像不请求外部资源
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
